# FrontDesk Pro Project Board

## Columns
- Backlog
- Ready
- In Progress
- In Review
- Blocked
- Done

## Rules
- New issues start in Backlog
- Move to Ready only when dependencies are clear
- Move to In Progress only when actively being worked
- Move to In Review when code/design is ready for review
- Move to Blocked when waiting on dependency or decision
- Move to Done only when acceptance criteria are met

## MVP Focus
Only pull these into active work first:
- Foundation
- Customers
- Jobs
- Scheduling
- Technicians
- Invoices / Payments
- Reminders
- AI Guide Phases 1–2
- Mobile-friendly web
